app.name: Automated Project Evaluation System
auth.loginSubtitle: Monitor submissions, AI providers, and rubric outcomes from one place.
auth.registerSubtitle: Start with provider setup, grading groups, and bilingual preferences.
dashboard.title: Evaluation command center
dashboard.subtitle: Track grading velocity, provider reliability, and recent submission activity.
dashboard.quickGroupsDesc: Create a new assignment group or refine criteria and weights.
dashboard.quickSubmissionsDesc: Upload a new submission and start evaluation immediately.
dashboard.quickProvidersDesc: Switch the default provider or test provider connectivity.
groups.title: Assignment groups
groups.subtitle: Define grading scales, activate cohorts, and keep rubric design consistent.
groups.name: Group name
groups.deleteConfirm: Delete the group "{{name}}" and permanently remove its {{criteriaCount}} criteria, {{submissionsCount}} submissions, and related evaluations? This action cannot be undone.
groups.deleteSuccess: The group and all its related data were deleted.
groups.criteriaCreateHint: Enter criteria here so the group is immediately ready for evaluation after creation.
groups.pendingCriterionHint: This criterion will be applied when you save.
groups.criterionNameValidation: Enter a criterion name with at least 2 characters.
groups.weightValidation: Enter a valid weight for this criterion.
groups.criteriaCreatePartial: The group was created, but criteria creation did not finish. Created criteria: {{count}}. Reason: {{message}}
groups.empty: No groups yet. Start by creating one structured rubric.
submissions.title: Submissions
submissions.subtitle: Upload batches, validate files, and monitor parsing and evaluation readiness.
submissions.studentIds: Student IDs (one per line, matching file order)
submissions.studentIdExtractionHint: The system will try to extract the student ID automatically from each file. If it cannot find one, the file will appear in a post-upload completion table.
submissions.archiveUploadHint: You can upload a ZIP file. The system will extract it and process only PDF, DOCX, and TXT files while skipping unsupported files inside the archive.
submissions.studentIdDetected: Student ID was detected from the file.
submissions.duplicateFilesDetected: {{count}} duplicate files were detected in this batch.
submissions.duplicateFilesDetectedHint: Remove the duplicate files before upload. The system checks duplicate filename, duplicate content, and duplicate student ID inside the current batch only.
submissions.removeDuplicatesBeforeUpload: Remove duplicate files from the list before uploading submissions.
submissions.existingDuplicatesDetectedHi: Some files match submissions that already exist in this group. Review them and explicitly choose whether to continue uploading each one.
submissions.resolveExistingDuplicatesBef: Review previously uploaded files and choose whether to continue uploading them before starting the upload.
submissions.alreadyEvaluatedExistingSubm: This file matches a submission that was already evaluated before.
submissions.alreadyUploadedExistingSubmi: This file matches a submission that was already uploaded before.
submissions.unsupportedFilesDetectedHint: Remove unsupported files before upload. Upload is blocked until every unsupported file is removed.
submissions.removeUnsupportedBeforeUploa: Remove unsupported files from the list before uploading submissions.
submissions.reportTableHint: This table shows all uploaded files with the latest evaluation for each file and a detailed criterion breakdown.
submissions.reportSearch: Search by filename, student ID, or status
submissions.noReportData: No result data is available yet for display or export.
submissions.selectGroupToView: Select an assignment group to show its submissions and results table.
submissions.lastBatchHint: This table shows the files from your latest upload with the student ID, total AI score, and each criterion result.
submissions.noCriterionScore: No score is available for this criterion in the latest result.
submissions.groupReady: This group is ready for automatic evaluation.
submissions.groupNotReady: This group is not ready for automatic evaluation yet. The current grade scale is {{gradeScale}}, but that is not the criteria weight total. The group currently has {{criteriaCount}} criteria and a criteria weight total of {{total}}. Add criteria and make the total weight 100.
submissions.noEvaluatableSubmissions: No evaluatable items are available right now.
submissions.batchQueued: {{count}} evaluations were queued in the background.
submissions.batchAlreadyRunning: A background evaluation run is already active for this account. Wait for it to finish, then try again.
submissions.batchNotActive: No active batch evaluation run was found.
submissions.batchCancelRequested: Immediate stop request sent for the batch run.
submissions.autoRetryRecovered: {{count}} evaluations succeeded after an automatic retry.
submissions.autoEvaluateFailed: {{count}} evaluations failed to start after upload.
submissions.missingStudentIdsHint: Enter a student ID for the files where the system could not extract one from the uploaded content. These submissions will not be evaluated until a student ID is saved.
submissions.missingStudentIdsDeferredNot: {{count}} file(s) were uploaded without a student ID. They were added to the table below and will not be evaluated until a student ID is saved.
submissions.studentIdRequired: Enter a student ID before saving.
submissions.studentIdDigitsOnlyMinLength: Student ID must contain digits only and be at least 5 digits.
submissions.empty: No submissions available for this instructor.
evaluations.title: Evaluation history
evaluations.subtitle: Review previous runs, compare latest outcomes, and open detailed feedback.
evaluations.allSubtitle: Browse every evaluated item, search through them, and open inline details or manual adjustment.
evaluations.searchPlaceholder: Search by filename, student ID, group, or provider
evaluations.weightContribution: This criterion contributes {{weight}}% of the final score.
evaluations.weightedHint: The final score is not a direct sum of the numbers; each criterion is multiplied by its weight first.
evaluations.currentManualScore: Last saved manual score: {{points}} out of {{weight}} | {{percent}}%
evaluations.manualPercentPreview: The entered value equals {{percent}}% on the general grade scale.
evaluations.manualPointsRange: Manual score must be between 0 and {{weight}} for this criterion.
providers.title: Provider configuration
providers.subtitle: Store encrypted API keys, select models, and enforce instructor-level quotas.
providers.modelHintOpenAI: Use an OpenAI API model ID such as gpt-4o-mini. ChatGPT app subscriptions are billed separately from the API.
providers.modelHintGemini: Use a Gemini API model ID such as gemini-2.0-flash.
providers.modelHintDeepSeek: Use deepseek-chat or deepseek-reasoner as the DeepSeek model ID.
providers.modelHintGroq: Use a Groq model ID such as llama-3.1-8b-instant for fast evaluation latency.
providers.modelHintOllama: Use a local Ollama model such as llama3.2, and make sure Ollama is running on http://localhost:11434.
providers.apiKeyHelpOpenAI: Get your key from OpenAI Platform > API keys > Create new secret key.
providers.apiKeyHelpGemini: Get your key from Google AI Studio > Get API key > Create API key.
providers.apiKeyHelpDeepSeek: Get your key from DeepSeek Platform > API Keys > Create.
providers.apiKeyHelpGroq: Get your key from Groq Console > API Keys > Create API Key.
providers.apiKeyNotRequired: Ollama runs locally and does not require an API key. Start Ollama and pull the selected model before testing the connection.
providers.apiKeyValidation: API key must be at least 8 characters.
providers.guardDescription: This account does not have an active default AI provider yet. Add a provider or mark one as default before managing groups, submissions, and evaluations.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.network.unreachable: Could not connect to the server.
errors.auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.data.notFound: The requested item could not be found.
errors.data.conflict: This action conflicts with existing data.
errors.validation.invalidRequest: The submitted data is not valid.
errors.validation.studentIdBeforeEvaluat: This file needs a student ID before it can be evaluated.
errors.validation.contentNotReady: The file content is not ready for evaluation.
errors.validation.noEvaluatable: There are no files ready for evaluation right now.
errors.validation.missingFiles: Please select at least one file first.
errors.upload.tooManyFiles: Too many files were selected in one upload.
errors.upload.fileTooLarge: One of the selected files is too large.
errors.upload.unsupportedFile: One of the selected files is not supported.
errors.upload.noSupportedFilesInArchive: The ZIP file does not contain supported files.
errors.upload.invalidArchive: The ZIP file could not be read.
errors.upload.duplicateInBatch: A duplicate file was found in this upload batch.
errors.upload.alreadyUploaded: A matching submission already exists in this group.
errors.provider.notConfigured: No active AI provider is configured.
errors.provider.connectionFailed: Could not connect to the selected AI provider.
errors.provider.ollamaUnavailable: Could not reach Ollama. Make sure it is running.
errors.provider.modelUnavailable: The selected model is not available on the current provider.
errors.provider.requestTooLarge: The file is too large for the current provider or model.
errors.provider.promptTooLarge: The request exceeds the provider limits.
errors.provider.rateLimit: The provider is temporarily rate-limited. Please try again shortly.
errors.provider.timeout: The provider took too long to respond.
errors.provider.invalidResponse: The provider returned an invalid evaluation response.
errors.evaluation.failed: The file could not be evaluated.
errors.server.unexpected: A server error occurred. Please try again.
settings.title: Preferences and account
settings.subtitle: Control locale direction, theme mode, and the current instructor profile context.
settings.passwordMismatch: Password confirmation does not match the new password.
